articles.title: Gold, Silver Rate Today Live Updates: International gold, silver prices rebound on US-Iran peace talks
articles.summary: Gold and silver prices began the week on a positive note on the Multi Commodity Exchange (MCX), recovering after two consecutive sessions of decline as easing crude oil prices followed indications of progress in the ongoing US-Iran peace negotiations. However, the outlook for precious metals continued to face pressure from expectations of higher US interest rates after the Federal Reserve's recent hawkish commentary.

articles.title: CUET UG 2026 final answer key out, cuet.nta.nic.in: NTA drops 7 questions, check complete details here
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency has published the final answer key for CUET UG 2026 after reviewing objections raised by candidates. Seven questions have been dropped from the examination.

articles.title: UP TET city intimation slip 2026 released at upsssc.gov.in: Direct link to download here
articles.summary: The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission has issued the UP TET 2026 city intimation slip, allowing candidates to check the city allotted for their examination scheduled from July 2 to 4. The document is meant for advance travel planning and is not a substitute for the admit card, which is set to be released on June 30..

articles.title: BTC Forest Guard admit card 2026 released at centralselectionboard.com: Direct link to download hall tickets
articles.summary: The Central Selection Board (BTC) has issued the BTC Forest Guard Admit Card 2026 for candidates appearing in the upcoming PMT and PET rounds. Alongside the hall tickets, authorities have announced the physical test schedule, with Forester-I assessments set for July 6–11 and Forest Guard tests from July 13–24.

articles.title: AP EAMCET result 2026 date and time: Check expected timeline and steps to download scorecards here
articles.summary: The AP EAMCET/EAPCET 2026 results are expected to be announced soon, with reports indicating a likely release by June 28. Candidates will be able to download their scorecards and rank cards from the APSCHE portal.
